message:
🐛 fix: ACMM GA4 event dedup, dead code removal, zero-criteria tracking (#8498) (#8501)

- Remove detectedCount > 0 gate so zero-criteria scans are tracked
- Replace useRef with sessionStorage for lastEmittedRepo dedup so
  page refreshes and remounts don't re-fire for the same repo
- Remove dead instanceof Set branch — detectedIds always arrives as
  an array from the API, never a Set

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
